question_title: Will ALGN's market close price on 2026-04-25 be higher than its market close price on 2026-04-13?
summary: ALGN close on April 25 (effectively April 24, a Friday) vs April 13 close, spanning 9 trading days. Current price is $173.14, down ~17% from 52-week high. Monte Carlo simulations with recent volatility (2.82%/day) give 50-58% probability of being higher, depending on drift assumptions. Zero-drift and bootstrap models cluster near 50-51%. Conditional on being in a 15%+ drawdown (378 historical events), 54% probability of positive 8-day return. Counterbalancing: after a recent +6% single-day spike (Apr 8), historical forward 10-day returns are only 47.8% positive. Broader market is recovering (S&P up 7.5% from recent low). Earnings are April 29 (after resolution). Evidence tilts very mildly positive but the stock's high volatility makes direction highly uncertain over this horizon.

factors.description: Unconditional base rate for 9-day stock direction is ~50-52% positive
Recent 20-day drift is positive (+0.18%/day), parametric GBM gives 57.6% up
Conditional on 15%+ drawdown from 52w high: 54% positive over 8 days (378 events)
Post-spike signal: after +6% single-day move, 10-day forward only 47.8% positive (23 events, weak sample)
Broader market recovering: S&P 500 up 7.5% from March 30 low, supportive backdrop
Earnings April 29 (after resolution) - pre-earnings drift can be slightly positive but adds uncertainty
High daily volatility (2.82%) makes direction inherently uncertain over 9 days

reasoning:
**Forecast: 53% probability** that ALGN's close on April 25 will be higher than its close on April 13.

**Key reasoning:**
- Over 9 trading days with 2.82% daily volatility (~39% annualized), direction is inherently close to a coin flip
- The drawdown conditional (17% below 52w high, 378 historical events → 54% positive) provides a mild bullish signal
- This is partially offset by the post-spike signal (after the +6% jump on Apr 8, only 47.8% of comparable events saw positive 10-day returns)
- Broader market recovery and slight positive drift push the estimate marginally above 50%
- Earnings on April 29 fall after resolution, so no direct earnings impact but pre-earnings positioning adds noise
sources_consulted: [Align Technology, Inc. (ALGN) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ALGN/)
[Align Technology, Inc. (ALGN) Latest Stock News & Headlines - Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/ALGN/news/)
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the latest market close price of ALGN. If it is higher than the close price on 2026-04-13, the question will resolve to 'Yes'. The close price will be pulled from the Yahoo Finance API.
fine_print: Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
